vite-microapp-react-demo.title: MicroApp + Vite Example
vite-microapp-react-demo.description: A React practice project based on the MicroApp micro-frontend framework and the Vite build tool, leveraging Module Federation for shared components and modules. It demonstrates how to seamlessly integrate multiple independent sub-applications, enabling cross-app component sharing and remote module loading, providing a quick-start practice template for frontend microservices.

mock-database.title: Mock Database
mock-database.description: A pure frontend mock database based on IndexedDB, exposing services via Module Federation, designed to provide local data storage and query capabilities for static web applications.

webpack-module-federation-demo.title: Webpack Module Federation Basic Example
webpack-module-federation-demo.description: An introductory micro-frontend example based on Webpack 5 Module Federation, demonstrating runtime module sharing.

webpack-mpa.title: Webpack Multi-Page Application Example
webpack-mpa.description: A multi-page application scaffold built on Webpack, integrating both React 17 and Vue 3 to demonstrate the collaborative build of two frameworks within a single project. It includes four independent entry points: Home (index), React admin, Vue admin, and Login. Features such as hot reload, on‑demand loading, code splitting, and multi‑environment configuration are supported. This serves as a reference example of multi‑page architecture and multi‑framework integration.

solar-system.title: Solar System
solar-system.description: A solar system simulation based on HTML5 Canvas.
